title: Rehabilitation After Amputation
description: A training day at the Amputation Forum, the annual Polish conference on amputation care. It covered the whole rehabilitation path: preparation before surgery, early care of the residual limb, prosthetic gait training and the return to activity, with this edition focused on prehabilitation.
detail: Amputation Forum (6th edition) · Rehabilitation Centre "Znowu w Biegu" · Kraków, 25.10.2025
